commentaries.author: Basil the Great
commentaries.content: Take heed that you do not make fasting to consist only in abstinence from meats. True fasting is to refrain from vice. Shred to pieces all your unjust contracts. Pardon your neighbors. Forgive them their trespasses. Homily , On Fasting.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: See Matthew ix. 14, and Luke v. 33.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: At all events, in the Gospel they think that those days were definitely appointed for fasts in which "the Bridegroom was taken away; "

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
